creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Failed to build after update:

ipmi_time.c:108:3: error: use of undeclared identifier 'daylight'
  108 |                 daylight = -1;
      |                 ^
1 error generated.
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:532: ipmi_time.lo] Error 1

gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/ipmitool/work/ipmitool'
gmake: *** [Makefile:418: all] Error 2
